title: Constant Contact vs Zoho Campaigns (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Constant Contact vs Zoho Campaigns: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Constant Contact vs Zoho Campaigns: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Constant Contact and Zoho Campaigns comes down to your specific use case. Constant Contact is built for nonprofits and local businesses, while Zoho Campaigns targets Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses

faq.q: Is Constant Contact better than Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Constant Contact wins for nonprofits and local businesses, while Zoho Campaigns is stronger for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Constant Contact or Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: Zoho Campaigns starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Zoho Campaigns to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
